overview: Hormones + Weight Loss offers bio-identical hormone replacement therapy and personalized weight loss treatment using a functional medicine approach at locations in Meridian, Twin Falls, and Lewiston, Idaho. The clinic addresses hormonal imbalances affecting weight, energy, and overall health.
highlights: GLP-1 weight loss injections and peptide therapy
Comprehensive lab panels and metabolic testing with InBody scale
targetAudience: Midlife and aging adults experiencing hormonal imbalances, weight gain, and related symptoms.
